params.delta: The caller's balance delta after adding liquidity; the sum of principal delta, fees accrued, and hook delta
params.feesAccrued: The fees accrued since the last time fees were collected from this position
params.hookData: Arbitrary data handed into the PoolManager by the liquidity provider to be passed on to the hook
params.sender: The initial msg.sender for the add liquidity call

returns._0: bytes4 The function selector for the hook
returns._1: BalanceDelta The hook's delta in token0 and token1. Positive: the hook is owed/took currency, negative: the hook owes/sent currency

params.amount1: The amount of token1 being donated

params.sender: The initial msg.sender for the donate call

params.key: The key for the pool being initialized
params.sender: The initial msg.sender for the initialize call
params.sqrtPriceX96: The sqrt(price) of the pool as a Q64.96
params.tick: The current tick after the state of a pool is initialized

returns._0: bytes4 The function selector for the hook

returns._1: BalanceDelta The hook's delta in token0 and token1. Positive: the hook is owed/took currency, negative: the hook owes/sent currency

returns._1: BeforeSwapDelta The hook's delta in specified and unspecified currencies. Positive: the hook is owed/took currency, negative: the hook owes/sent currency
returns._2: uint24 Optionally override the lp fee, only used if three conditions are met: 1. the Pool has a dynamic fee, 2. the value's 2nd highest bit is set (23rd bit, 0x400000), and 3. the value is less than or equal to the maximum fee (1 million)

cancelOrder(uint256).details: Removes the order from its tick bucket. If the bucket becomes empty,      removes the tick from the active linked list.      Protected by ReentrancyGuard against ERC-777 callbacks.

params.orderId: The ID of the order to cancel

params._initialOwner: The address that will own this contract (EOA deployer)

createLimitOrder((address,address,uint24.details: Transfers the input token from the caller to this contract.      The order is indexed by its aligned tick and inserted into the      sorted active tick linked list for efficient scanning.      Protected by ReentrancyGuard against ERC-777 callbacks.

params.amountIn: Amount of input token to deposit
params.poolKey: The Uniswap V4 pool to associate the order with
params.triggerPrice: Price threshold for execution (uint128 scaled to 1e18)
params.zeroForOne: True = selling token0 for token1; False = buying token0 with token1

returns.orderId: The unique ID of the created order

forceCancelOrder(uint256).details: Used to clean up orders where creator == address(0) but isFilled == false      (e.g., Order #0 from Phase 3.13), or orders stuck due to token issues.      Returns funds to the original creator if still set; otherwise just cleans state.

params.orderId: The ID of the order to force-cancel

getHookPermissions().details: Phase 3.10: afterSwap only (no beforeSwap, no returnDelta)

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.newFeeBps: New fee in basis points (0–50, where 50 = 0.5%)

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

params.currency: The currency to withdraw fees for
params.recipient: The address to send fees to

GAS_LIMIT_PER_ORDER().notice: Minimum gas required to attempt executing one more order

MAX_ACTIVE_TICK_SCAN().notice: Maximum number of *populated* ticks to process per swap

MAX_SLIPPAGE_BPS().notice: Maximum allowed slippage in basis points (50 = 0.5%)

SENTINEL_MIN().notice: Sentinel values for linked list boundaries

beforeSwap(address,(address,address,uint.notice: The hook called before a swap

cancelOrder(uint256).notice: Cancel an active order and return deposited tokens

createLimitOrder((address,address,uint24.notice: Create a new limit order with token custody

feeBps().notice: Current execution fee in basis points (default: 5 = 0.05%)

forceCancelOrder(uint256).notice: Force-cancel an orphaned or stuck order (admin only)

getHookPermissions().notice: Declare which hook callbacks this contract implements

getNextActiveTick(int24).notice: Get the next active tick above the given tick

getOrder(uint256).notice: Get full order data by ID

getOrdersInTick(int24).notice: Get all order IDs in a specific tick bucket

getPendingFees(address).notice: Get accumulated fees for a specific currency

getPrevActiveTick(int24).notice: Get the next active tick below the given tick

getTickBucket(uint256).notice: Get the tick bucket an order was assigned to

getUserOrders(address).notice: Get all order IDs for a given user

isActiveTick(int24).notice: Quick check: does this tick have orders?

nextActiveTick(int24).notice: Forward pointer: tick -> next higher active tick

pendingFees(address).notice: Accumulated fees per currency, withdrawable by owner

prevActiveTick(int24).notice: Backward pointer: tick -> next lower active tick

setFeeBps(uint256).notice: Update the execution fee rate (owner only)

sqrtPriceToUint128(uint160).notice: Convert sqrtPriceX96 (Uniswap format) to uint128 price scaled to 1e18

tickToOrders(int24,uint256).notice: Tick-based order indexing for O(1) lookup

uint128ToSqrtPrice(uint128).notice: Convert uint128 price (1e18 scaled) to sqrtPriceX96

withdrawFees(address,address).notice: Withdraw accumulated fees for a specific currency (owner only)
